name: vm-poppy
description: Spin up throwaway Linux or Windows VMs in your own AWS from reusable configs — an AgentsPoppy extension.

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:sidecar
scripts.validate-manifest: node --input-type=module -e "import {parseManifest} from '/Users/mt/Projects/agentspoppy/packages/extension-sdk/dist/index.js'; import {readFileSync} from 'node:fs'; parseManifest(readFileSync('extension.json','utf8')); console.log('extension.json OK');"
